title: Overhauled Horde Spawn Engine
description: The ultimate configurable horde spawning engine for Minecraft
body:
# 📦 OHSE – Overhauled Horde Spawn Engine
NB: WILL BE OPEN-SOURCE WHEN FULLY FUNCTIONAL

**The ultimate configurable horde spawning engine for Minecraft.**

OHSE is an advanced spawn engine that replaces the classic entity generation system with a horde-based one.  
Designed to be ultra-configurable, efficient, and immersive, it allows you to manage the spawning of any mob in a natural and coherent way.

## ✨ Main Features

- 🟢 Horde spawning: entities appear in realistic groups (herds, swarms, schools…).

- 🌍 Configurable zones: define roads, cities, biomes, caves, or oceans with their own rules.

- ⚙️ Full compatibility: works with any mob ID (vanilla or modded).

- ⏱ Advanced conditions: spawn based on time of day, weather, or custom tags.

- 📉 Server optimization: limits the number of individual entities → better performance.

- 🗺 Scalable: handles both small maps and giant worlds (65k blocks and more).
